name: vid_export_matte
description: Package a tracked object's per-frame masks into a downloadable artifact. args: {masksDir?, rleJson?, format: 'png-sequence'|'mp4-cutout', video?} — exactly one of masksDir (a sandbox-relative dir of frame-*.png mask files) or rleJson (a sandbox-relative path to a COCO-RLE masks.rle.json, either a single {width,height,counts} object or a list of them). 'png-sequence' (default, most portable) zips the masks into matte.zip. 'mp4-cutout' additionally needs `video` (the source clip) and alpha-composites the mask onto it as an MP4 cutout, falling back to matte.zip with a 'warning' field if that isn't possible in this environment. Returns {outputPath, frames, format}.
